---
name: create-instructions
agent: Instructions Generator
description: Generate or update instruction files based on the provided information about a specific layer of architecture or coding standards within the app.
---
Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory.  If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate an appropriate filename base on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long.  Make sure to update the /docs/AGENTS.md file to reference the new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
